title: Krasnoyarsk、Krasnoyarsk Krai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Krasnoyarsk、Krasnoyarsk Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Krasnoyarsk是Krasnoyarsk Krai的一个城市，人口约1,090,000。A major Siberian city on the Yenisei River, a center of hydroelectric power and aluminum production, surrounded by stunning nature.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
